idea: Terraform-managed ECS Fargate service behind an application load balancer
why_this_project_matters: This project brings together networking, container runtime configuration, and controlled public ingress in a format common to production platform teams.
architecture: Terraform provisions a VPC, public subnets, an application load balancer, and an ECS Fargate service. The task definition pulls a container image from a registry, CloudWatch logs capture runtime output, and the security groups expose only the ALB listener while keeping tasks private.
steps: Set the VPC CIDR, subnet ranges, container image, and desired count for your environment.
Initialize and review the Terraform plan carefully because multiple network-facing resources are created.
Apply the infrastructure and confirm the ECS service reaches steady state.
Test the ALB endpoint and verify task logs appear in CloudWatch.
Add autoscaling, remote state, and deployment pipelines after the base service is stable.
